source_document.title: Spectrum Systems Done Certification Gate GOV10 Design
source_document.notes: Raw PDF is not present in repository at extraction time; artifact is a fail-closed starter extraction with declared obligations only.

key_components.statement: Governed source-ingestion component must register this source and gate downstream usage on structured extraction availability.

architectural_invariants.statement: Structured extraction artifacts are authoritative for automation; raw PDFs are reference inputs only.

authority_boundaries.statement: Source-derived obligations must remain traceable to source_document metadata and traceability rows.

artifact_families.statement: This source contributes to governed extraction, source inventory, obligation index, and component-source map artifacts.

required_schemas.statement: Structured extraction files must validate against contracts/schemas/source_design_extraction.schema.json.

sequencing_constraints.statement: Schema validation must pass before index build writes any output files.

failure_modes.statement: Missing source PDF or malformed extraction must block trusted index generation for authoritative consumption.

fail_closed_requirements.statement: Pipeline must fail closed on malformed extraction content and avoid inferred obligations without traceability rows.

replayability_requirements.statement: Index generation over unchanged structured inputs must produce byte-stable ordered outputs.

observability_requirements.statement: Inventory status must explicitly expose missing vs available source files for governance visibility.

certification_requirements.statement: Roadmap and architecture prompts must cite source_inventory and obligation_index records as evidence artifacts.

sre_alignment.statement: Governed extraction supports reliability by enforcing deterministic validation, traceability, and explicit failure signaling.

explicit_non_goals.statement: This starter artifact does not claim semantic extraction of unavailable PDF body content.

roadmap_implications.statement: Future roadmap generation must consume governed source indexes instead of relying on unstructured raw PDFs.

source_traceability_rows.obligation_statement: Register source in governed inventory and require structured extraction validation before design obligations are consumed.
source_traceability_rows.source_excerpt: No excerpt available because source PDF is missing in-repo at extraction time.
